subject: [PATCH v2 0/7] mm: switch THP shrinker to list_lru

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the lockdep splat and suggested using explicit rcu_read_lock() annotation to fix it. Also requested splitting out list_lru prep bits for easier review.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch series aims to switch the THP (Transparent Huge Pages) shrinker from its current implementation to use list_lru instead. The change involves refactoring and cleaning up existing code, extending the list_lru API to accommodate private state synchronization, and finally switching the deferred_split_queue to list_lru.
